evals.name: pr-ready-full-gate
evals.prompt: PR ready? I added a dashboard API route for exporting clients.
evals.expected_output: Runs or requests npm run verify, checks API auth on new route, classifies change type, outputs SHIP|FIX|REJECT with numbered blockers.

evals.name: schema-without-migration-blocker
evals.prompt: Ship this PR — I updated the schema file with a new column but no migration file yet.
evals.expected_output: FIX with B-002 schema drift blocker; does not approve SHIP.

evals.name: reject-edited-migration
evals.prompt: Merge review: I edited an already-applied migration file to fix a typo in production.
evals.expected_output: REJECT with B-003; explains forward-only migration policy.

evals.name: trigger-should-not-design
evals.prompt: Apple quality review of checkout button contrast
